name: RelationshipActualsOperationContracts
description: Concrete request, result, stable error, filter, totals, and cursor contracts for transfers, refunds, relationships, and actuals.
schema_def: All operations use the common OperationDescriptor envelopes. Mutations require --idempotency-key.
- result RelationshipDetail: {relationshipId, type: transfer, roles, principalAmount, currencyCode, status, confirmedActor, confirmedAt}

- errors: LEDGER-TRANSACTION-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-TRANSACTION-INACTIVE exit6; LEDGER-TRANSFER-ROLE-INVALID exit6; LEDGER-TRANSFER-SAME-ACCOUNT exit6; LEDGER-TRANSFER-AMOUNT-MISMATCH exit6; LEDGER-RELATIONSHIP-CONFLICT exit5
- errors: LEDGER-RELATIONSHIP-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-RELATIONSHIP-TYPE-MISMATCH exit6; LEDGER-RELATIONSHIP-INACTIVE exit6
- errors: revoke errors plus transfer confirm errors
- result RelationshipDetail: {relationshipId, type: refund, roles, principalAmount, currencyCode, status, confirmedActor, confirmedAt}
- errors: LEDGER-TRANSACTION-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-TRANSACTION-INACTIVE exit6; LEDGER-REFUND-ROLE-INVALID exit6; LEDGER-REFUND-AMOUNT-EXCEEDED exit6; LEDGER-RELATIONSHIP-CONFLICT exit5
- errors: LEDGER-RELATIONSHIP-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-RELATIONSHIP-TYPE-MISMATCH exit6; LEDGER-RELATIONSHIP-INACTIVE exit6
- errors: revoke errors plus refund confirm errors
- result: RelationshipDetail plus lifecycleHistory[] when requested

- first-page input: {filters?: {accountIds?: id[], effectiveDateFrom?: LocalDate, effectiveDateTo?: LocalDate, categoryIds?: id[], transferState?: included|excluded|only, refundState?: netted|gross|only, relationshipState?: related|unrelated|any, categorizationState?: categorized|uncategorized|any, transactionLifecycle?: active|inactive|any}, pageSize: integer 1..500}
- result: {items: ActualsItem[], totals: {netAccountMovement, externalSpend, budgetActual, currencyCode}, cursor?: opaque text, expiresAt?: UTC instant, snapshotId}
- errors: LEDGER-ACTUALS-FILTER-INVALID exit3; LEDGER-CURSOR-INVALID exit7; LEDGER-CURSOR-EXPIRED exit7; LEDGER-CURSOR-INCOMPATIBLE exit7; LEDGER-SNAPSHOT-BUSY exit5

Constraints: transfer/refund roles are explicit; active role exclusivity and cumulative refund limits are transactional. First-page snapshot creation is one BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction; no cursor is returned before commit. Later cursor pages are read-only and cannot include filters.
